productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Stripes Purple Shirts
description: Composition Purple full sleeves shirt with green and white stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a patch pocket on the left chest and a full length buttoned placket Fitting Regular Wash care Machine/hand wash in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron Formal clothes don't have to be boring! Make your weekdays fun by wearing this formal striped shirt from indigo nation. This vibrantly coloured shirt guarantees appreciative glances, while the cotton fabric gives utmost comfort all day long. Pair it with well-fitting formal trousers and a pair of leather shoes to take the office by storm! Model statistics The model wears size 40 in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
